title: Shawia hygrophila
taxonomy: Shawia hygrophila is classified in the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the ice plant family. This family is part of the order Caryophyllales, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The order Caryophyllales is further grouped into the clade core eudicots, which is a group of flowering plants that are closely related to each other. Within the Aizoaceae family, Shawia hygrophila is part of the subfamily Aizoideae, which contains many other species of succulent plants. The classification of Shawia hygrophila reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history as a succulent plant adapted to arid environments.
